title: poikilogyne cordifolia
intro: Poikilogyne cordifolia is a plant species belonging to the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the Heart-leaved Poikilogyne. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Poikilogyne cordifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a decoction or infusion, and may also be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
